Exports every memory in the active (or specified) profile via the
Python MCP sidecar's export_profile tool. Sidecar-only for now because
the Python path handles pagination and Markdown rendering; a native
port lives behind the same blocker as import (entity extractor).

Output goes to stdout by default; pass --output path/to/file.json to
write directly to disk instead. JSON is the default format (per rc4
UX) -- pass --format markdown for the human-readable variant.

Usage:
  ogham export [flags]

Flags:
      --format string    Output format: json or markdown (default "json")
  -h, --help             help for export
  -o, --output string    Write to this file instead of stdout
      --profile string   Profile to export (defaults to active)

Global Flags:
      --legacy          Route through the Python MCP sidecar instead of native Go
      --python          Alias for --legacy
  -q, --quiet           Suppress stderr informational notices (sidecar fallback message)
      --text            Human-readable output (default is JSON for LLM / script consumption)
  -v, --verbose count   Increase stderr log verbosity (-v = info, -vv = debug)
